description.value: You have stopped trying to find the gap in their defense. You are removing the defense.

system.benefits: Once per turn when you hit with a [Two-Handed] weapon, you may declare the strike an Overwhelming blow. The target makes a [[/save type=fortitude]] opposed by your Strength + Melee Combat. On failure they gain the Prone condition. On Margin 2 they are Prone regardless of the save result.
